title: Days Counter Mod ByLukeMCPE
description: Days Counter is a lightweight utility mod that adds an in-game day counter to the HUD.
body:
Days Counter is a lightweight utility mod that adds an in-game day counter to the HUD. No need to open F3 anymore – simply track how many days have passed in your world at a glance.

How to use:
Keys:
H — toggle HUD on/off.
J — toggle style (normal with the bar or transparent).
Arrow keys — move the HUD (only works outside of chat).

Commands:
/dayscolor <hex_color> — change the "Day" text color (for example, FF0000 for red).
/sethud <x> <y> — set HUD position (for example, /sethud 0 0 for the top-left corner).

/daymessages on/off.

All settings are saved after exiting.
